---
name: mega-drive-emulator-develop
description: Work on Mega Drive / Genesis emulator architecture and implementation. Use for CPU, Z80, VDP, APU, memory map, deterministic execution, WASM bindings, JSON-RPC/WebSocket/MCP control APIs, save states, trace logging, hardware accuracy, and emulator testing.
---

# SKILL: MegaDrive Emulator Engineering

## 📚 Required Knowledge Domains

### 1. Hardware Architecture

* Motorola 68000 instruction set
* Zilog Z80 architecture
* Memory-mapped IO
* Interrupt handling

### 2. Graphics (VDP)

* Tile-based rendering
* Sprite priority
* DMA behavior
* Scanline timing

### 3. Audio

* FM synthesis (YM2612)
* PSG sound generation

### 4. Emulator Design

* Cycle accuracy vs instruction accuracy
* Event scheduling
* Synchronization (CPU / VDP / APU)

### 5. Reverse Engineering

* Read hardware docs
* Analyze test ROM behavior

---

## 🔧 Engineering Skills

* Rust (preferred)
* WebAssembly
* Low-level bit manipulation
* Performance profiling
* Deterministic simulation

---

## 🤖 AI Integration Skills

* Design machine-readable APIs
* State serialization (save states)
* Debug hooks
* Trace logging

---

## 📡 Communication Protocols

* JSON-RPC
* WebSocket
* MCP

---

## 🧪 Testing Skills

* Golden tests
* Snapshot comparison
* Automated ROM execution

---

## 📦 Output Requirements

* Clean modular code
* Full API documentation
* Deterministic behavior
* Debuggable state exposure

---

## 🚀 Stretch Goals

* Cycle-accurate timing
* Shader-based CRT simulation
* AI-assisted gameplay automation
* Auto-debugging via memory diff
